AbilityDescriptionRows.RawRow: 24824	Throw a bundle of netting at a targeted location, which immediately expands to cover a {COM_3_RADI_FEET} radial area around the location. Enemies caught in the netting are snared, disabled, and will take damage with every step they attempt to make.
